_comment: EventGrid subscription that fires the Logic App orchestrator when a new manifest blob lands in the manifest container. Mirrors the AWS EventBridge rule on s3:ObjectCreated. Filtered to suffix `.json` and prefix `departures/` so the reconciler's `.last_hash` companion file does not trigger remediation.

properties._resourceIdNote: Replace ${LogicAppFunctionResourceId} with the Logic-App-bound Function trigger resource id at deploy time, e.g. /subscriptions/<sub>/resourceGroups/<rg>/providers/Microsoft.Web/sites/${LogicAppName}/functions/${EventGridTriggerName}

prerequisites: Manifest storage account must have an EventGrid system topic created (see arm_template.json).
Logic App must expose an HTTP-trigger Function bound via the Microsoft.Web/sites/functions resource type.
Dead-letter container `deadletter` must exist on the audit storage account.
